summary: Iteration 9 verified end-to-end: (1) Backend GET /api/resources injects best_resources for all 6 expected subjects (operating-systems, dbms, computer-networks, system-design, oops, sql-practice), each item has title/url/type/desc, and known curated links (OSTEP, System Design Primer, Neso Academy across OS/DBMS/CN, LeetCode SQL) are present; GET /api/resources/{slug} returns same; unknown slug returns 404. (2) end_interview round-grouping algorithm validated by inline reproduction (5 messages -> rounds {1,2}, not_conducted=[3,4]); endpoint returns 404 for unknown id and 401 without auth. (3) Frontend: Landing renders [data-testid=three-background] with a <canvas> (particles variant + nodes variant in features section); Dashboard renders three-background grid variant with canvas. (4) Resources page: 6 subject tabs, Best Resources block per subject with type badges (Practice/Book/Video/Article/Tutorial/Interactive) and external link icons, Key Topics section below; verified per-tab counts (OS=5, DBMS=6, CN=5, SD=6, OOP=5, SQL=6). (5) ProblemWorkspace (/problems/prob_00001 - Two Sum): [data-testid=complexity-graph] rendered with TIME COMPLEXITY COMPARISON heading and all 7 rows (O(1)..O(n!)); O(n) row correctly tagged 'YOUR SOLUTION' by matchComplexity given desc.time_complexity='O(n)'. 11/11 backend pytest cases pass. NOTE: problem id format is prob_NNNNN (not dsa_NNNNN as stated in request).
action_items: Doc nit: review_request says /problems/dsa_00001 but actual route uses prob_NNNNN format (e.g. /problems/prob_00001). Update internal docs/test instructions.
Carry-over from iter8 (still unaddressed): server.py is now ~1136 lines; consider modularization (auth, problems, interviews, resources/curated, community, profile/badges).
Carry-over from iter8: streak calculation in /api/profile/stats queries interview_messages without user_id filter (server.py line ~466). Latent bug; will manifest with multiple users.
Carry-over from iter8: THREE.Clock deprecation warning emitted by ThreeBackground/DSAVisualizer; migrate to THREE.Timer.
critical_code_review_comments: CURATED_RESOURCES is a 47-line static dict embedded in server.py - acceptable now, but if it grows further, extract to backend/data/curated_resources.json or backend/curated_resources.py for hot-update without redeploy.

ComplexityGraph in ProblemWorkspace.jsx hardcodes COMPLEXITIES array; the regex/normalization in matchComplexity is brittle for variants like 'O(N)' vs 'O(n)' (currently handled with toLowerCase+replace, OK). Consider a small unit test.

InterviewReport.jsx line 84 detects 'not conducted' rounds via score===0 OR feedback substring match; this couples UI to AI free-text. Better: backend should set a boolean flag like round_conducted on each round in the report payload.

end_interview groups by round_number but the AI fallback (when JSON parsing fails) still sets score=50 for conducted rounds - misleading. Consider score=null with a 'evaluation_failed' flag so the UI can show a distinct state.
Resources.jsx renders all subject tab contents simultaneously when tabs are switched; large lists could become heavy. Currently fine (~6 tabs x 5 items).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Landing 3D bg, Dashboard 3D bg, Resources 6 subjects, ProblemWorkspace ComplexityGraph all verified)

seed_data_creation: None. Read-only verification against existing seeded resources (6 subjects) and problems (15068).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully verified. Tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9.py: TestResourcesBestResources (6), TestEndInterviewRoundGrouping (3), TestRegression (2). Frontend data-testids confirmed: three-background (landing + dashboard, with canvas children), resources-page, tab-{slug} for 6 slugs, best-resources-{slug}, resource-link-{i}, topic-card-{i}, problem-workspace, complexity-graph (rendered when desc.time_complexity is truthy on the description tab; contains 'TIME COMPLEXITY COMPARISON' and 7 rows with one labelled 'YOUR SOLUTION'). Note: problem URLs use prob_NNNNN, not dsa_NNNNN. End-to-end interview report run was NOT executed (would require running a full multi-round AI interview); the round-grouping algorithm was instead validated by inline reproduction and by 401/404 error paths on /api/interviews/{id}/end. Auth via cookie session_token for protected pages.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found in this iteration's features. Latent issues carried over from iter8 (streak query missing user_id filter; THREE.Clock deprecation; server.py file size) remain open.
